messages.content: Dear Sir, I have placed order (order no 15952) on 16 Mar 2018 at kydsmart.com  but after spending 13  days my order is   it yet to deliver . I think you are not able to provide delivery of my order. So I would like to cancel my order and please refund my money accordingly. I am not interested in any further follow up & buying anything from you. I am totally disappointed & harassed from your team & customer care. I have made a couple of humble request to your team & customer care but unfortunately we have received empty promises nothing else. Please help me out

share.share_text: For a superior and amazing shopping experience, Kydsmart ensures extensive quality checks from storage to final packaging. We have partnered with leading vendors ans all branded products sold on Kydsmart are 100% genuine.
